goal: Promote high-value local-hold artifacts into mainline-safe assets by integrating asset reference validation into pipeline and documenting curation decisions.
constraints: Do not modify gameplay runtime logic.
Only promote artifacts with direct long-term value (pipeline validation and durable process docs).
Do not reintroduce temporary reports or raw prompt dumps into tracked files.
Keep changes small, auditable, and compatible with current gate flow.
deliverables: scripts/pipeline/validate-assets.cjs restored as tracked validation script
